channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: SeatGeek and Spotify team up to offer concert ticket sales inside the music platform
item.description: SeatGeek announced on Wednesday a new integration with Spotify, bringing a seamless ticket-buying experience for Spotify users. Now, when Spotify user...

item.title: Ring and Kidde’s Newest Smoke Detector Is Here, and It’s Battery Powered (2026)
item.description: The Alexa-enabled smoke detector is Kidde’s second model in collaboration with Ring—no wires required.

item.title: Data breach at fintech giant Figure affects close to a million customers
item.description: The Figure data breach allowed hackers to steal customer names, dates of birth, physical addresses, phone numbers, and email addresses.

item.title: A Vast Trove of Exposed Social Security Numbers May Put Millions at Risk of Identity Theft
item.description: A database left accessible to anyone online contained billions of records, including sensitive personal data that criminals appear to have not yet exp...

item.title: Save on Gaming Earbuds Perfect for Playing on Switch or ROG Xbox Ally
item.description: While it may sound unorthodox, these earbuds make a great companion for your Switch 2 or other portable console.

item.title: A startup called Germ becomes the first private messenger that launches directly from Bluesky’s app
item.description: Social network Bluesky now offers private messaging by integrating the startup Germ's E2E encrypted messenger natively in its app.

item.title: Amazon halts Blue Jay robotics project after less than 6 months
item.description: Amazon said Blue Jay's core tech will be used for other robotics projects and the employees who worked on it were moved to other projects.

item.title: Nvidia’s Deal With Meta Signals a New Era in Computing Power
item.description: The days of tech giants buying up discrete chips are over. AI companies now need GPUs, CPUs, and everything in between.

item.title: Mastodon, a decentralized alternative to X, plans to target creators with new features
item.description: Mastodon is looking to grow its open source, decentralized social network with new features aimed at creators.

item.title: This Defense Company Made AI Agents That Blow Things Up
item.description: Scout AI is using technology borrowed from the AI industry to power lethal weapons—and recently demonstrated its explosive potential.
